LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Standard.label: .998 cal bolter shell (Standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Standard.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Inferno.label: .998 cal bolter shell (Inferno)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Inferno.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_MetalStorm.label: .998 cal bolter shell (Metal Storm)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_MetalStorm.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Kraken.label: .998 cal bolter shell (Kraken)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Kraken.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Tempest.label: .998 cal bolter shell (Tempest)
LanguageData.Ammo_Bolter998_Tempest.description: A .998 caliber, gryojet-stabilized projectile with an explosive charge and hardened tip, fired from most patterns of Astartes heavy bolters.
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter998_Standard.label: .998 cal bolt (Standard)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter998_Inferno.label: .998 cal bolt (Inferno)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter998_MetalStorm.label: .998 cal bolt (Metal Storm)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter998_Kraken.label: .998 cal bolt (Kraken)
LanguageData.Bullet_Bolter998_Tempest.label: .998 cal bolt (Tempest)
